seo_data.generated_keywords: POCO X7 Pro, Dimensity 8400-Ultra, 120Hz AMOLED, 50MP OIS camera, 6000mAh battery, 90W HyperCharge, IP68, HyperOS 2, LPDDR5X, UFS 4.0, Gorilla Glass 7i, LiquidCool Technology 4.0, WildBoost Optimization 3.0
seo_data.meta_title: POCO X7 Pro: Flagship Dimensity 8400-Ultra, 120Hz AMOLED
seo_data.meta_description: Experience full speed ahead with the POCO X7 Pro. Featuring a Dimensity 8400-Ultra, 6000mAh battery with 90W HyperCharge, 1.5K 120Hz AMOLED display, and 50MP OIS camera.
seo_data.seo_long_description:
The POCO X7 Pro redefines speed and performance, powered by the flagship Dimensity 8400-Ultra chipset. This device boasts a world-first ARM Cortex-A725 CPU architecture and TSMC's advanced 4nm process, delivering an impressive AnTuTu score of 1,704,330 for superior gaming and multitasking. Enhanced by WildBoost Optimization 3.0 and LiquidCool Technology 4.0 with a 5000mm² ultra-large loop pump, the X7 Pro maintains peak performance even during intense use, ensuring stable frame rates and lower power consumption.

Visuals come alive on the 6.67-inch CrystalRes 1.5K 120Hz AMOLED display, offering 3200 nits peak brightness, Dolby Vision, HDR10+, and Corning Gorilla Glass 7i protection. Capture stunning moments with the 50MP main camera featuring OIS and a 1/1.95" sensor, complemented by an 8MP ultrawide lens and a 20MP front camera. A robust 6000mAh battery with 90W HyperCharge ensures rapid power-ups, reaching 100% in just 42 minutes, while IP68 dust and water resistance provides flagship-level durability.

range_overview:
The POCO X7 Pro is engineered for users demanding flagship-level performance and an immersive mobile experience. At its core, the device features the Dimensity 8400-Ultra chipset, built on TSMC's advanced 4nm process technology. This powerful processor, combined with LPDDR5X RAM and UFS 4.0 storage, achieves an AnTuTu score of 1,704,330, ensuring exceptional speed and efficiency for gaming, multitasking, and demanding applications. To sustain this high performance, the X7 Pro incorporates the POCO 3D IceLoop system, part of LiquidCool Technology 4.0, which effectively dissipates heat with a 5000mm² ultra-large loop pump and a unique vapor-liquid separation design.

Visuals are a highlight on the POCO X7 Pro's 6.67-inch CrystalRes 1.5K AMOLED display. This vibrant screen offers a 120Hz refresh rate, 3200 nits peak brightness, 1920Hz PWM dimming, and supports Dolby Vision and HDR10+. Protected by Corning Gorilla Glass 7i, the display provides an ultra-slim bezel for a premium viewing experience, enhanced by features like sunlight mode, reading mode, and TÜV Rheinland certifications for eye comfort. The audio experience is equally impressive with dual speakers and Dolby Atmos® support, alongside Hi-Res Audio capabilities.

Photography and videography are handled by a versatile camera system, led by a 50MP main camera with Optical Image Stabilization (OIS) and a large 1/1.95" sensor for detailed shots in various conditions. An 8MP ultrawide camera expands creative possibilities, while the 20MP front camera is equipped for high-quality selfies and video calls. Powering this robust hardware is a 6000mAh (typ) battery, supported by 90W HyperCharge technology that can fully charge the device in approximately 42 minutes. The POCO X7 Pro also boasts IP68 dust and water resistance, providing enhanced durability and peace of mind for daily use.
sales_arguments: Flagship Dimensity 8400-Ultra processor delivers unparalleled speed and efficiency for gaming and multitasking, achieving an AnTuTu score of 1,704,330.
Immersive 6.67-inch CrystalRes 1.5K 120Hz AMOLED display with 3200 nits peak brightness, Dolby Vision, and Corning Gorilla Glass 7i for stunning visuals and durability.
Long-lasting 6000mAh (typ) battery with 90W HyperCharge, capable of reaching 100% charge in just 42 minutes.
Capture professional-grade photos and stable videos with the 50MP main camera featuring OIS and a large 1/1.95" sensor.
Enhanced durability and protection with IP68 dust and water resistance, ensuring the device can withstand challenging environments.

technical_specifications.CPU: Octa-core (1x3.25 GHz Cortex-A725 & 3x3.0 GHz Cortex-A725 & 4x2.1 GHz Cortex-A725)
technical_specifications.Display Type: AMOLED, 68B colors, 120Hz, 1920Hz PWM, Dolby Vision, HDR10+, 1400 nits (HBM), 3200 nits (peak)
technical_specifications.Build: Glass front (Gorilla Glass 7i), plastic back, silicone polymer back (eco leather)
technical_specifications.SIM: Nano-SIM + Nano-SIM, Dual SIM, dual standby (5G+5G, 5G+4G)
technical_specifications.Audio: Dual speakers, Dolby Atmos®, Hi-Res Audio, Hi-Res Audio Wireless
technical_specifications.Sensors: Fingerprint (under display, optical), accelerometer, gyro, proximity, compass, IR blaster, X-axis linear vibration motor
technical_specifications.Colors: Black/Yellow, White, Green, Red (Iron Man Edition)
